trigger_keywords: se embotella con levadura natural sin deguelle

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A partially fermented wine is bottled before its first alcoholic fermentation has finished.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Fermentation continues in the sealed bottle and the carbon dioxide produced by yeast dissolves into the wine instead of escaping.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Sparkle is created from one continuous fermentation; traditional examples may retain yeast sediment because riddling and disgorgement are not required.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Sparkle is created from one continuous fermentation; traditional examples may retain yeast sediment because riddling and disgorgement are not required.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
